summary: Phase 30 - Tested food_orders.py refactoring: datetime.now().isoformat() replaced with get_now(). All food order APIs working correctly.

minor.issue: Return type annotation was -> dict but returns list. Fixed to -> List[dict]

critical_code_review_comments: get_now() helper function correctly returns datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
18+ usages of datetime.now().isoformat() replaced with get_now() in food_orders.py
Remaining datetime.now(timezone.utc) usages are for datetime objects (not strings) - correct behavior
Fixed minor type annotation bug: /api/food/orders/my-orders return type changed from dict to List[dict]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 30 refactoring verified: get_now() helper function works correctly. All food order APIs (create, cancel, status update, batch orders) functioning properly. Minor fix applied to /api/food/orders/my-orders return type annotation.

get_now_helper.details: Returns datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat() - correct ISO format with timezone

food_orders_apis.details: All endpoints tested: my-orders, my-scheduled, seller, store/orders, cancel, check-distance

refactoring_scope.details: 18+ datetime.now().isoformat() calls replaced with get_now(). 9 remaining datetime.now(timezone.utc) usages are for datetime objects (not strings)
